fields.name: heading
fields.label: Heading

fields.name: intro
fields.label: Intro paragraph
fields.default_value: The WordPress Research Fellows Program pairs Software Engineering undergraduates with faculty mentors to solve real problems in plugin architecture, editor UX, performance, security, and accessibility — the same systems that power the department’s own web infrastructure.
